title: Kasam
subTitle: While Neha is busy looking for the heaviest Mangal Sutra, Tanu gets a simple one. Meanwhile, Rishi sees Pawan and Saloni holding hands outside the shop. Later, Tanu stops Rishi from helping her try on a Mangal Sutra, explaining its significance.

title: Kasam
subTitle: At the jewelers, Tanu and Rishi have an argument about nuptials and rituals. Pawan gifts Saloni a diamond bracelet and Tanu sees them together. Later, Bani tries to bribe the priest to prepone Tanu and Pawan's wedding, but is interrupted by Ahana.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Tanu mulls on telling Rishi the truth, and Raj Singh pokes fun at Rishi for fasting. Pawan sets his hateful gaze on Rishi and walks out, after which he threatens Neha to speak the truth. Meanwhile, Rano sees them together and gets suspicious.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi interrupts Pawan from marrying Tanu and begins the 'Pheras' himself, earning his father's ire. Neha appeals to her mother to stop him but fails. Later, Tanu admits that she loves Rishi in front of everyone. Has Rishi's dream finally come true?

title: Balika Vadhu - Kacchi Umar Ke Pakke Rishte
subTitle: Anandi, a child bride, married into an affluent family at a tender age, struggles to cope with the traditions. Soon, she overcomes multiple personal obstacles to emerge as an example for rural women.

subTitle: Suraj confronts Shivaay over the heavy loss caused by a digital scam, but Shivaay's mother firmly defends him. Later, Shivaay asks Baldev for three months to repay fifty lakh rupees.

subTitle: Dheeraj and Rajji marry at a temple after Vidya urges them to take the step. Afterwards, Dheeraj decides that Mahadev must never learn about Vidya's involvement in their wedding.

title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
subTitle: Parvez faces Kausar's probing questions regarding Munira, the child he insisted died at birth. Meanwhile, Seher alerts Mahid that a hidden enemy within his own family is working against him.

title: Kasam
subTitle: When Pawan shields Saloni from the fire, Rishi and the entire family sense a different motive behind his urgency. As Bani believes there is something fishy about Pawan's family, Rishi confronts Pawan and Saloni about their true relationship.

title: Kasam
subTitle: After hearing Pawan's challenge, Rishi has trouble deciding his next step. Later, Rishi goes to collect the jewellery where he makes a discovery about Pawan and his wife, Saloni. Meanwhile, Rano questions Neha about whom she really likes.

title: Kasam
subTitle: Pawan's wicked charade is about to be exposed, as Rishi sneaks into his house and finds damning evidence to prove that he is married to Saloni. Yuvi and Manpreet, meanwhile, have some wise counsel for Tanvi, as they urge her to give Rishi a chance.
